{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230501116A5F1B0ADC35A2920939"}"},"total":310},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7470437733595136830","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"难得的无女主无暧昧，大部分是很温馨的，宠兽和男主之间写的非常有爱，路人以及朋友也都很好，没有大众的打比赛输了我就记恨上你了情节"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739353085,"group_id":"7454947356073528345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书荒中..受控..不喜..民国.古代.糙汉.年代.“跪”“罚”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+D5w/eKpNGUbQC8lDknLTcMnJtezr/zxJyx6a5EThtA","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/205121af7c4244ee98a19428e7ed125e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793716&x-signature=vihF4ygS8JULfKd%2BO6yrHFfC4lE%3D","user_id":"2119478839871335","user_name":"矜矜先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2119478839871335","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1758304271,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7454947356073528345","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽流】【天才流】【无尽强化】【无女主】
迷雾中猩红的竖瞳，在深渊中游动的禁忌……无尽虚空窃窃呓语，破败荒芜的星辰……扭曲翻涌的血肉，阴影之触在不断蔓延……
喂喂喂！听我解释！它们真不是邪神啊！
我们的羁绊啊，会让诸神陨落，万族俯首！
灭世之蛇一口将咆哮的巨龙吞下，少年的衣角被风吹动。
世界啊，这是我们的舞台，这是我们的时代！
熟练度不够？加点！无进化途径？加点！
秦江面对采访:这不是开挂，重申，这不是开挂，这只是平平无奇的天赋罢了，今天的一切都是我和我的伙伴用勤奋换来的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9a47e2db78d6da660f6ce188b301f3c9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜的黑","author_id":"","book_id":"7454947356073528345","book_name":"全民御兽：从黑晶蛇开始成神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#4870a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3238人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7454948189905355289","read_count":"3238","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1103588"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"498","tags":"都市高武,都市,宠物,天才,无女主,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8da0795bb100ad1bc9d71201ddc30534~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397271&x-signature=787z9a0dsW%2BdOjdEh9ZvCRJ6rTw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54910785613","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230501116A5F1B0ADC35A2920939"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小 小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3001,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15186,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5854},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1740483758,"author_reply_time":1740483768,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7569582586169951001","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025.11.6留，三星
过了一段时间再看又看不下去了[捂脸][捂脸]之前是更新到77，看了感觉很好看，现在过去了七八个月，勉强看到116，之前的评论说淡淡的日常感很好看，现在可能是人没有之前这么心静了，感觉完全看不下去[捂脸][捂脸]太日常了，太平淡了，我再过段时间再回来看看还能不能再看下去，因为真的最开始是非常喜欢一口气看完七十章的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762433177,"group_id":"7454947356073528345","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2731620232333783"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7454947356073528345","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"115"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15448,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7468990708933460761","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不是常规套路，狐朋狗友、极品亲戚、倒贴/傲娇女、见不得别人好的同学老师领导这些统统没有！很少见的加点流但无系统纯面板！
通篇是淡淡的日常味，靠着面板加点真正实现了 不要小瞧我们的羁绊啊 的文学。虽然说是天才流，但是这些都是在别人看来，主角的加点面板是他觉醒的天赋，无重生无穿越，最喜欢的是这个面板是纯的，没有括号来几句贱兮兮的话，也不是系统不会说话。
目前所有人都很好，简介没有备注无女主，但是我觉得这样子比那些说无女主，结果阶段性强者都是女生然后不可避免地去接触，然后来个傲娇+外貌详细描写+娇喝，最后再次强调无女主不代表不会跟女的接触，这种类型的好了不知道多少倍。
这本书有女的，阶段性强者也有女的，但是不会把女生弱化或者是着重描写外貌或者是莫名其妙对男主有好感然后贴上来。说真的，如果不是偶尔注意到“她”我都不知道这是女的。反正这才是我一直想要看到的无女主文。
然后是天才流，这个天才是在别人看来的，但是男主和兽宠没有停止过练习，这是真的靠自己努力再通过自己的天赋面板加点来锦上添花。
总之这本书我真的很喜欢！淡淡的日常感和人与人与兽之间的羁绊感，真的看得我尸斑都淡了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739014599,"group_id":"7454947356073528345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"按已看的章数和比例分类并抽象评价。 喜欢好嗑+男频爽文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/shjuGfQorBEvpx2SRYITH6Aq9q3MGQSWqdwQiF8j0L","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cec0a4aebb854585aa79f6b3a4fcdb4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788237&x-signature=MghIZKXUc1qfs%2BAINEO6bqEmRGs%3D","user_id":"2731620232333783","user_name":"wkansnjsj"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2731620232333783","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7454947356073528345","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽流】【天才流】【无尽强化】【无女主】
